diffCoverage.notes: Two layers touched (zalo + command). The session store lives in the command layer as a precursor to session-manager; send is delegated to zalo.

findings.evidence: send_message stays in the command layer and calls zalo::send_text; the in-command HashMap<AccountId, Arc<API>> is a minimal session holder that will be lifted into the dedicated session layer by the session-manager feature. No zca-rust types leak above zalo. Forward-only order preserved.
findings.fix: Move the session store into the session/ layer when session-manager is implemented; keep send delegation in zalo.

summary: Cross-layer change (zalo + command) reviewed for layering. send_message reuses a command-layer session store and delegates the network send to zalo; zca-rust stays confined to zalo. The session holder is acknowledged as a temporary precursor to the session layer. Forward-only DAG preserved. Approve.
